---
title: "The Rev. Robert Everson Harrisson [sic]"
---

## The Rev. Robert Everson Harrisson [sic]

**Dates:** (1818/9-1902)

### Description

Rector of Bishopstoke

### Biography

He was to decide on the date for the consecration of Eastleigh church, 1868, Eastleigh being a new parish carved out of Bishopstoke.  The first incumbent, the Rev. W. A. Longlands, was appointed Vicar of Eastleigh, by Bishopstoke Station in the following year. [<i>Jackson’s Oxford Journal</i> 23 January 1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
